title: Don't Stand So Close to Me
why_this_song: Don't Stand So Close to Me by The Police (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stand" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stand" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Don't stand so close to me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: (Please don't stand so close to me)

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Don't Stand So Close to Me", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Don't Stand So Close to Me", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Don't Stand So Close to Me" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Don't Stand So Close to Me" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Don't Stand So Close to Me" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Don't Stand So Close to Me", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Don't Stand So Close to Me" was released in 1980. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Don't Stand So Close to Me" foi lançada em 1980. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
